targetTranslation: possessing/having (describes السَّمَآءِ and connects to ٱلْبُرُوجِ)
ayahEnglish: By the sky containing great stars
Destroyed [i.e., cursed] were the companions of the trench
Destroyed [i.e., cursed] were the companions of the trench

targetTranslation: of (connecting النَّارِ 'the fire' with الْوَقُودِ 'the fuel')
ayahEnglish: [Containing] the fire full of fuel,

targetTranslation: when (referring to a past time, followed by هُمْ عَلَيْهَا قُعُودٌ)
ayahEnglish: When they were sitting near it.
When they were sitting near it.

targetTranslation: sitting (as a group, subject of هُمْ)
ayahEnglish: When they were sitting near it.

ayahArabic: وَهُمْ عَلَىٰ مَا يَفْعَلُونَ بِٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ شُهُودٌ
ayahEnglish: And they, to what they were doing against the believers, were witnesses.

targetTranslation: they do/act (referring to the disbelievers watching the believers)
ayahArabic: وَهُمْ عَلَىٰ مَا يَفْعَلُونَ بِٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ شُهُودٌ
ayahEnglish: And they, to what they were doing against the believers, were witnesses.

targetTranslation: witnesses (who are watching what is being done to the believers)
ayahArabic: وَهُمْ عَلَىٰ مَا يَفْعَلُونَ بِٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ شُهُودٌ
ayahEnglish: And they, to what they were doing against the believers, were witnesses.

ayahArabic: وَمَا نَقَمُوا۟ مِنْهُمْ إِلَّآ أَن يُؤْمِنُوا۟ بِٱللَّهِ ٱلْعَزِيزِ ٱلْحَمِيدِ
ayahEnglish: And they resented them not except because they believed in Allāh, the Exalted in Might, the Praiseworthy,

ayahArabic: وَمَا نَقَمُوا۟ مِنْهُمْ إِلَّآ أَن يُؤْمِنُوا۟ بِٱللَّهِ ٱلْعَزِيزِ ٱلْحَمِيدِ
ayahEnglish: And they resented them not except because they believed in Allāh, the Exalted in Might, the Praiseworthy,

ayahArabic: ٱلَّذِى لَهُۥ مُلْكُ ٱلسَّمٰوٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ وَٱللَّهُ عَلَىٰ كُلِّ شَىْءٍ شَهِيدٌ
ayahEnglish: To whom belongs the dominion of the heavens and the earth. And Allāh, over all things, is Witness.

targetTranslation: dominion/kingdom (subject of لَهُۥ - to him belongs)
ayahArabic: ٱلَّذِى لَهُۥ مُلْكُ ٱلسَّمٰوٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ وَٱللَّهُ عَلَىٰ كُلِّ شَىْءٍ شَهِيدٌ
ayahEnglish: To whom belongs the dominion of the heavens and the earth. And Allāh, over all things, is Witness.

ayahArabic: ٱلَّذِى لَهُۥ مُلْكُ ٱلسَّمٰوٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ وَٱللَّهُ عَلَىٰ كُلِّ شَىْءٍ شَهِيدٌ
ayahEnglish: To whom belongs the dominion of the heavens and the earth. And Allāh, over all things, is Witness.

ayahArabic: ٱلَّذِى لَهُۥ مُلْكُ ٱلسَّمٰوٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ وَٱللَّهُ عَلَىٰ كُلِّ شَىْءٍ شَهِيدٌ
ayahEnglish: To whom belongs the dominion of the heavens and the earth. And Allāh, over all things, is Witness.

ayahArabic: ٱلَّذِى لَهُۥ مُلْكُ ٱلسَّمٰوٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ وَٱللَّهُ عَلَىٰ كُلِّ شَىْءٍ شَهِيدٌ
ayahEnglish: To whom belongs the dominion of the heavens and the earth. And Allāh, over all things, is Witness.

targetTranslation: those who (referring to multiple people who persecuted the believers)
ayahArabic: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ فَتَنُوا۟ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ وَٱلْمُؤْمِنٰتِ ثُمَّ لَمْ يَتُوبُوا۟ فَلَهُمْ عَذَابُ جَهَنَّمَ وَلَهُمْ عَذَابُ ٱلْحَرِيقِ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, those who have tortured the believing men and believing women and then have not repented will have the punishment of Hell, and they will have the punishment of the Burning Fire.

targetTranslation: they tested/persecuted (subject of لَمْ يَتُوبُوا - did not repent)
ayahArabic: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ فَتَنُوا۟ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ وَٱلْمُؤْمِنٰتِ ثُمَّ لَمْ يَتُوبُوا۟ فَلَهُمْ عَذَابُ جَهَنَّمَ وَلَهُمْ عَذَابُ ٱلْحَرِيقِ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, those who have tortured the believing men and believing women and then have not repented will have the punishment of Hell, and they will have the punishment of the Burning Fire.

targetTranslation: they return back (to what is right)
ayahArabic: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ فَتَنُوا۟ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ وَٱلْمُؤْمِنٰتِ ثُمَّ لَمْ يَتُوبُوا۟ فَلَهُمْ عَذَابُ جَهَنَّمَ وَلَهُمْ عَذَابُ ٱلْحَرِيقِ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, those who have tortured the believing men and believing women and then have not repented will have the punishment of Hell, and they will have the punishment of the Burning Fire.

ayahArabic: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ فَتَنُوا۟ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ وَٱلْمُؤْمِنٰتِ ثُمَّ لَمْ يَتُوبُوا۟ فَلَهُمْ عَذَابُ جَهَنَّمَ وَلَهُمْ عَذَابُ ٱلْحَرِيقِ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, those who have tortured the believing men and believing women and then have not repented will have the punishment of Hell, and they will have the punishment of the Burning Fire.

ayahArabic: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ فَتَنُوا۟ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ وَٱلْمُؤْمِنٰتِ ثُمَّ لَمْ يَتُوبُوا۟ فَلَهُمْ عَذَابُ جَهَنَّمَ وَلَهُمْ عَذَابُ ٱلْحَرِيقِ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, those who have tortured the believing men and believing women and then have not repented will have the punishment of Hell, and they will have the punishment of the Burning Fire.

ayahArabic: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ فَتَنُوا۟ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ وَٱلْمُؤْمِنٰتِ ثُمَّ لَمْ يَتُوبُوا۟ فَلَهُمْ عَذَابُ جَهَنَّمَ وَلَهُمْ عَذَابُ ٱلْحَرِيقِ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, those who have tortured the believing men and believing women and then have not repented will have the punishment of Hell, and they will have the punishment of the Burning Fire.

targetTranslation: those who - connects descriptions to people or things
ayahArabic: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَعَمِلُوا۟ ٱلصَّالِحٰتِ لَهُمْ جَنَّاتٌ تَجْرِى مِن تَحْتِهَا ٱلْأَنْهٰرُ ذٰلِكَ ٱلْفَوْزُ ٱلْكَبِيرُ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, those who have believed and done righteous deeds will have gardens beneath which rivers flow. That is the great attainment.

targetTranslation: they believed (connected to وَعَمِلُوا۟ - and they did)
ayahArabic: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَعَمِلُوا۟ ٱلصَّالِحٰتِ لَهُمْ جَنَّاتٌ تَجْرِى مِن تَحْتِهَا ٱلْأَنْهٰرُ ذٰلِكَ ٱلْفَوْزُ ٱلْكَبِيرُ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, those who have believed and done righteous deeds will have gardens beneath which rivers flow. That is the great attainment.

ayahArabic: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَعَمِلُوا۟ ٱلصَّالِحٰتِ لَهُمْ جَنَّاتٌ تَجْرِى مِن تَحْتِهَا ٱلْأَنْهٰرُ ذٰلِكَ ٱلْفَوْزُ ٱلْكَبِيرُ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, those who have believed and done righteous deeds will have gardens beneath which rivers flow. That is the great attainment.
